use_cases: Showcasing design portfolio work with animated image grid
Displaying creative projects in a marquee-style gallery layout
Featuring work samples with hover effects for interactive browsing
Building portfolio sections for agency or freelancer websites
Creating visual archives of completed projects with click handlers
ai_summary: A portfolio gallery component featuring an animated marquee-style image grid with hover interactions. Uses Framer Motion for smooth animations and displays project thumbnails with scale effects on hover. Includes configurable title, archive button, and custom image click handlers. Ideal for creative professionals, agencies, and designers to showcase their work samples in a visually engaging, horizontally scrolling layout.
